g.text: M1: Core Foundation - QuantizationConfig, scale/zero_point computation, quantize/dequantize ops
M2: Granularity - PerTensorQuantizer, PerChannelQuantizer, WeightQuantizer, ChannelUtils
M3: Calibration - MinMax, Percentile calibrators, Collector, Storage, Monitor
M4: PTQ Pipeline - PTQConfig, QuantizedLinear, QuantizedResidualAdd, BatchNorm folding
M5: GPTQ - Hessian-based quantization, INT4 packing, perplexity measurement
